creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: 책횆횋횓횁횗 횙횑횛횜횂횁 횚횇횊횓횋횧횇횙횏횕횎 횖횕횆횆횇횘횜횏횋 횪챌챕챤챈챦 횪챈천 <support@sfedu.ru>
Date: 2012/1/10
Subject: Re: ports/153277: databases/postgresql90-server crashes
during compilation whith dtrace enabled
To: crees@freebsd.org


Hello.
As far as I remember, I've already sent you logs from "make install"
for postgresql91-server and postgresql90-server with enabled dtrace.

The ports were built on FreeBSD-9/i386.


On 12/31/2011 14:41, crees@FreeBSD.org wrote:
>
> Synopsis: databases/postgresql90-server crashes 혳during compilation whith dtrace enabled
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->closed
> State-Changed-By: crees
> State-Changed-When: Sat Dec 31 10:41:52 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why:
> Feedback timeout, several updates since this PR was submitted, can't
> reproduce. 혳If you disagree, please email me and I'll investigate
> further.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=153277
